PyCon 2025

Annual Python Conference

Register Now

About PyCon 2025

PyCon 2025 is the premier annual conference bringing together Python developers from around the world. Join us for three days of inspiring talks, hands-on workshops, and networking opportunities with the global Python community.

Expert Speakers

Learn from leading Python developers and industry experts sharing their knowledge and experience.

Hands-On Workshops

Participate in interactive workshops covering the latest Python frameworks, tools, and best practices.

Networking

Connect with fellow developers, share ideas, and build lasting relationships with the Python community.

Conference Schedule

Three days of talks, workshops, and community engagement.

Day 1: Opening & Keynotes

Monday, June 2, 2025

Welcome to PyCon 2025! Start with opening remarks and keynote presentations from industry leaders.

Day 2: Workshops & Talks

Tuesday, June 3, 2025

Dive deep into technical talks and hands-on workshops covering web development, data science, and more.

Day 3: Advanced Topics & Closing

Wednesday, June 4, 2025

Explore advanced topics, lightning talks, and closing remarks celebrating the Python community.

Venue Information

Conference Location

Convention Center

123 Developer Street

Tech City, TC 12345

United States

Getting There

The venue is easily accessible by public transportation. Free parking is available for registered attendees. Detailed directions and transportation information will be provided upon registration.

Register for PyCon 2025

Secure your spot at PyCon 2025 today! Early bird tickets are available at a special rate for a limited time.

Bringing together Python developers from around the world.
